'''Rer'chof''' was a member of the [[BloodScar]] [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] gang stationed on [[Gepparin]]. When [[Emperor's Hand/Legends|Emperor's Hand]] [[Mara Jade Skywalker|Mara Jade]] visited [[the Commodore]], Rer'chof came along with her to the Commodore.

==Appearances==
